reviews.review_title: Think of it as alpha testing
reviews.review_description:
I like the menu.

Voice response works good.

Youtube player is neat.  It doesnt support 3d and many videos dont play right on it.

For a free app that is obviously in its early stages its not bad.

Moving around would be nice too.

Oh.  And why is the coffee table so close to the couch!  Its basically touching!  Haha

It's a decent vr loft type apartment, but you are stuck to just one place on the sofa, at least alow people to change seat position, or even better would be move anywhere in the apartment. 
Also most of the videos don't work, and no way to control them if you do get them to play. Also I would like different lighting scenarios to make it more comfortable.
Im asking alot maybe, but this is at least what this type of app needs to make people want to use it.

reviews.review_title: Not a good idea. Not well done either.
reviews.review_description: You don't even get to walk around the loft.
